name: cha-sales-tool
description: CHA Sales Command Center - static HTML/CSS/JS dashboard

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test:e2e
scripts.version:bust: node -e "var f=require('fs');var t=Date.now();var h=f.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');h=h.replace(/\?v=\d+/g,'?v='+t);f.writeFileSync('index.html',h);console.log('Cache busted to v='+t);"
scripts.check: node --check js/plan-registry.js && node --check js/plan-data.js && node --check js/policy-docs.js && node --check js/app.js && node --check js/chat.js && node --check js/plans-benefits.js && node --check js/call-playbook.js && node --check js/utils.js && echo ALL FILES PASS
scripts.revert: git revert HEAD --no-edit && git push origin main
